name: web:search
description: Search the public internet for a given topic or query. Returns a list of relevant URLs with titles and snippets. Use this to find sources before fetching their content.

query.description: The search query (e.g., 'artificial intelligence news this week', 'Gemini 2.0 release').

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 5, max: 10).

name: web:fetch
description: Fetch and read the full text content of a public URL. Converts the HTML page into clean, readable Markdown. Use this after web:search to read full articles.

url.description: The full URL of the page to fetch (e.g., 'https://techcrunch.com/article-name').

name: web:news
description: Search specifically for recent news articles on a topic. Returns headlines and summaries from news sources. Ideal for market intelligence and trend monitoring.

topic.description: The news topic to search for (e.g., 'AI startup funding', 'GPT-5 release').

language.description: Language of the news results: 'it' for Italian, 'en' for English (default: 'en').
